page_metadata.biotools__summary: The ENsemble Fusion (EnFusion) repo contains a Dockerfile to build a Docker Image that can overlap outputs from 7 fusion detection algorithms, to identify high confidence fusion events.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The ENsemble Fusion (EnFusion) repo contains a Dockerfile to build a Docker Image that can overlap outputs from 7 fusion detection algorithms, to identify high confidence fusion events.
